title: ICAR IARI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ICAR IARI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR IARI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have Masters in Plant Physiology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Plant Science/ Life Science or equivalent qualification are eligible to apply for these Project Associate-I vacancies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC and 5 years for SC/ST and women candidates as per govt. guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Plant Physiology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Plant Science/ Life Science or equivalent
qualification.details: Masters in Plant Physiology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Plant Science/ Life Science or equivalent qualification required. Desirable: Research experience in field work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR IARI Project Associate-I position is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Master's degree in Plant Physiology, Botany, Biotechnology, Plant Science, Life Science, or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 31,000 plus 24% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICAR IARI Project Associate-I job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Does ICAR IARI offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, ICAR IARI offers age relaxation of 3 years for OBC candidates and 5 years for SC/ST and women candidates, as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-I at ICAR IARI is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
